Bash(cd /e/programy/claude_kody/kosmos && python -c "
for f in ['src/scenes/PlanetGlobeScene.js', 'src/scenes/UIManager.js', 'src/systems/DepositSystem.js']:
    with open\(f, encoding='utf-8'\) as fp:
        text = fp.read\(\)
    opens = text.count\('{'\)
    closes = text.count\('}'\)
    print\(f'{f}: open={opens}, close={closes}, balanced={opens == closes}'\)
" 2>&1)
